001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception.ConflictException;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception.DuplicateIssueTypeException;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception.IssueTypeNotFoundException;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueReport;
007import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueType;
008import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository.IssueReportRepository;
009import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository.IssueTypeRepository;
010import java.util.List;
011import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
012import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort;
013import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort.Direction;
014import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
015
016/**
017 * Default {@link IssueTypeService} implementation backed by {@link IssueTypeRepository}.
018 */
019@Service
020public class IssueTypeServiceImpl implements IssueTypeService {
021
022  private final IssueTypeRepository tagRepository;
023
024  /**
025   * Creates a service using the provided repository.
026   *
027   * @param tagRepository issue type repository.
028   */
029  @Autowired
030  public IssueTypeServiceImpl(IssueTypeRepository tagRepository) {
031    this.tagRepository = tagRepository;
032  }
033
034  @Override
035  public List<IssueType> getAll() {
036    return tagRepository.findAll(Sort.by(Direction.ASC, "issueTypeTag"));
037  }
038
039  @Override
040  public IssueType getByIssueTypeTag(String issueTypeTag) {
041    IssueType issueType = tagRepository.findByIssueTypeTag(issueTypeTag);
042    if (issueType == null) {
043      throw new IssueTypeNotFoundException("Issue type tag not found: " + issueTypeTag);
044    }
045    return issueType;
046  }
047
048  @Override
049  public IssueType createNewIssueType(IssueType newIssueType) {
050    if (tagRepository.existsByIssueTypeTag(newIssueType.getIssueTypeTag())) {
051      throw new DuplicateIssueTypeException("Issue type tag already exists: " + newIssueType.getIssueTypeTag());
052    }
053    return tagRepository.save(newIssueType);
054  }
055
056  @Override
057  public IssueType updateIssueTypeDescription(String issueTypeTag, String newIssueTypeDescription) {
058    IssueType tagToChange = tagRepository.findByIssueTypeTag(issueTypeTag);
059    if (tagToChange == null) {
060      throw new IssueTypeNotFoundException("Issue type tag not found: " + issueTypeTag);
061    }
062    tagToChange.setIssueTypeDescription(newIssueTypeDescription);
063    return tagRepository.save(tagToChange);
064  }
065
066  @Override
067  public void deleteUnusedIssueType(String issueTypeTag) {
068    IssueType doomedTag = tagRepository.findByIssueTypeTag(issueTypeTag);
069    if (doomedTag == null) {
070      throw new IssueTypeNotFoundException("Issue type tag not found: " + issueTypeTag);
071    }    if (doomedTag.getIssueReports().isEmpty()) {
072      tagRepository.delete(doomedTag);
073    } else {
074      throw new ConflictException("Cannot delete issue type with active reports");
075    }
076  }
077}
